pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d Transformer pairs MLP3.5x LeakyReLU² with Value Residual, gated attention, and hashing tricks plus sliding-window eval.
techniques: Muon optimizer with momentum warmup, EMA, warmdown, and Late QAT+clipping
Int6 GPTQ-lite quantization with zstd-22 compression and FP16 passthrough on tied embeddings
MLP3.5x with Partial RoPE, SmearGate, Gated Attention, XSA-all-11, and U-Net skip connections
